description: Drug Development Clinical Trials - Landing Ingestion Set 1

individual_job_params.query: SELECT study_id, study_code, study_title, study_phase, therapeutic_area, indication, drug_name, molecule_type, sponsor_name, study_status, study_start_date, study_end_date, target_enrollment, actual_enrollment, protocol_version, created_date, modified_date FROM rdbms_source.drug_studies

SELECT study_country_id, study_id, country_code, country_name, regulatory_authority, regulatory_submission_date, regulatory_approval_date, country_status, planned_sites, active_sites, first_patient_in_date, last_patient_out_date, created_date, modified_date FROM rdbms_source.study_country

SELECT study_site_id, study_id, study_country_id, site_number, site_name, principal_investigator, site_address, city, state_province, postal_code, site_status, site_initiation_date, site_closure_date, target_enrollment, actual_enrollment, created_date, modified_date FROM rdbms_source.study_site

SELECT study_event_id, study_id, event_code, event_name, event_category, event_type, planned_date, actual_date, event_status, event_description, event_owner, created_date, modified_date FROM rdbms_source.study_event

SELECT study_country_event_id, study_id, study_country_id, study_event_id, country_event_code, planned_date, actual_date, event_status, responsible_person, comments, created_date, modified_date FROM rdbms_source.study_country_event

SELECT monitoring_visit_id, study_id, study_site_id, visit_code, visit_type, visit_status, planned_start_date, planned_end_date, actual_start_date, actual_end_date, monitor_name, visit_report_status, findings_count, critical_findings_count, follow_up_required, visit_notes, created_date, modified_date FROM rdbms_source.monitoring_visit

SELECT adverse_event_id, study_id, patient_id, study_site_id, event_term, event_category, severity, seriousness, onset_date, resolution_date, outcome, causality_assessment, action_taken, reporter_type, reported_date, created_date, modified_date FROM rdbms_source.adverse_event

SELECT patient_id, study_id, study_site_id, patient_number, gender, date_of_birth, age_at_enrollment, race, ethnicity, consent_date, enrollment_date, randomization_date, randomization_group, enrollment_status, withdrawal_date, withdrawal_reason, created_date, modified_date FROM rdbms_source.patient_enrollment

SELECT drug_product_id, study_id, drug_name, dosage_form, strength, strength_unit, route_of_administration, manufacturer_name, batch_number, lot_number, manufacturing_date, expiry_date, storage_conditions, product_status, created_date, modified_date FROM rdbms_source.drug_product

SELECT submission_id, study_id, drug_product_id, submission_type, regulatory_agency, country_code, submission_date, acknowledgment_date, review_status, approval_date, rejection_reason, submission_reference_number, reviewer_name, submission_notes, created_date, modified_date FROM rdbms_source.regulatory_submission
